author: Siliconera
text:
Vampire Crawlers 2026 Roadmap Teases New Characters, Cards, and Stages
The first Vampire Crawlers roadmap for 2026 update releases is here and teases three new additions.

author: Siliconera
text:
Sonic Frontiers Definitive Edition Heading to Switch 2
Ratings suggested Sonic Frontiers: Definitive Edition could be coming to Switch 2, and we saw it today.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Japanese Disney Mobile Game Is Sparklink Stars
Disney and Coly are working on a Japanese mobile game about "Spark Riders" called Disney Sparklink Stars.

author: Siliconera
text:
Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 Shows West City Characters Like Bulma
The new Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 trailer shows story scenes, the West City location, characters like Bulma, and combat.

author: Siliconera
text:
Hololive Fuwawa and Mococo Fuwamoco Nendoroids Only Sold Separately
The pre-orders for the Hololive Fuwawa and Mococo Nendoroids is live and you can only buy Fuwamoco separately and not together.

author: Siliconera
text:
Rhythm Heaven Groove Starter Demo Drops on Switch
It's possible to try out Rhythm Heaven Groove single and multiplayer minigames in a new Switch demo.

author: Siliconera
text:
Farming Life Sim Kynseed Heads to Switch, PS4, PS5, and Xbox
The tavern is open in the PC version of Kynseed ahead of the farming life sim's debut on the Switch, PS4, PS5, and Xbox consoles.

author: Siliconera
text:
Hear the One Piece Heroines Anime Theme Song in a New Trailer
AiNA The End's "Blue Shining Star" will also appear on streaming services before the anime's launch.

author: Siliconera
text:
Resident Evil Requiem Singing Zombie Can Be Your Bride
A new corpse bride's in town.

author: Siliconera
text:
Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked Switch 2 Port Is Accessible and a Little Awkward
Demeo x Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked on Switch 2 port makes it more accessible, but the camera and controls can get awkward.

author: Siliconera
text:
6th New Love and Deepspace Love Interest Is EonCore’s Valko
The new Love and Deepspace character and sixth love interest will be a werewolf named Valko.

author: Siliconera
text:
Suikoden Star Leap Platform Rollout Shared
Japan will get the PC version when the rest of us does.

author: Siliconera
text:
Steam Machine Companion Cube PC Case Cover Appears
We'll see Portal Companion Cube PC covers after the release of the Valve Steam Machine models.

author: Siliconera
text:
Blue Reflection Quartet Games Pre-Order Bonus Aid Photo Mode
See the Blue Reflection Quartet pre-order bonus photo mode additions and new trailer for the games.

author: Siliconera
text:
My Dress-Up Darling Marin Kitagawa Bunny Girl Figure Arrives
The new My Dress-Up Darling Marin Kitagawa Taito figure puts the character in her Halloween bunny girl costume.
